title: ipomoea kondaparthiensis
intro: Ipomoea kondaparthiensis, also known as the Andra Pradesh morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea kondaparthiensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. Ipomoea kondaparthiensis can be prepared as a decoction or powder and is often used in herbal teas or supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
